summary: All 3 bug fixes verified: 1) Photo lightbox opens/closes correctly, 2) Admin view shows both making % and ₹/g while print view shows only ₹/g, 3) Back button navigates to previous page instead of dashboard
passed_tests: Photo lightbox opens when clicking photo thumbnail on bill page
Photo lightbox displays image correctly (green test image visible)
Photo lightbox closes via X button (data-testid='lightbox-close')
Photo lightbox closes by clicking outside the image on dark overlay
Admin bill view (per_gram making): shows '7.7% ₹500/g' in item details
Admin bill view (percentage making): shows '15.0% ₹978/g' in item details
Admin bill summary sidebar shows making breakdown with % and ₹/g for each item
Print view (BillPrintView) shows only per gram - 'Making (Rs.978/g)' - NO percentage
Print view (BillPrintView) for per_gram type shows only 'Making (Rs.500/g)' - NO percentage
Back button: Customer List → Customer History → Bill → Back returns to Customer History
Back button: All Bills → Bill → Back returns to All Bills page
critical_code_review_comments: BillPage.js lines 544-566: Photo lightbox implementation using simple overlay with onClick handler - works correctly
BillPage.js lines 64-87: getMakingPerGram and getMakingPercent functions correctly calculate both values for display
BillPage.js lines 349-376: Item making charges display shows both % and ₹/g for admin, only ₹/g for others
BillPage.js lines 433-450: Summary sidebar shows making breakdown with % and ₹/g for admin users
BillPrintView.js lines 147-167: Print view correctly shows only ₹/g format without percentage
BillPage.js lines 54-60: goBack function uses window.history to navigate back, falls back to dashboard if no history

admin.method: Click 'Admin Login' link on login page, then fill credentials and click 'Sign In as Admin'

context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 bugs/features are fixed and working: (1) Photo lightbox no longer shows error - opens as simple overlay with dark bg, closes via X or clicking outside; (2) Admin sees '7.7% ₹500/g' format while print/PDF shows only 'Rs.500/g'; (3) Back button uses history.back() to return to previous page instead of always going to dashboard.

photo_lightbox.implementation: Simple fixed overlay div with onClick to close, image with stopPropagation

back_button_navigation.customer_history_flow: Customer List → Customer History → Bill → Back → Customer History (NOT dashboard)
back_button_navigation.all_bills_flow: All Bills → Bill → Back → All Bills (NOT dashboard)
back_button_navigation.implementation: Uses window.history.state.idx to determine if there's history, then navigate(-1)

mocked_apis.OTP_delivery: OTP codes shown on admin dashboard instead of actual delivery
